notes: This is a static internal data layer for the CardScanR app.
This is not a supported public developer API.
Current price files may be overwritten each build.
Per-set current price files are latest-known snapshots, not guaranteed live quotes.
Price freshness/status metadata files are UTC and intended for app visibility and countdown UX.
Card detail freshness should use priceRecord.fetchedAtUtc, priceRecord.nextExpectedPriceUpdateAtUtc, and priceRecord.staleness.status.
Set-level freshness should use setFile.lastSuccessfulPriceUpdateAtUtc and setFile.nextExpectedPriceUpdateAtUtc.
Current prices are cached latest-known values and are not guaranteed live quotes.
Manual refresh in the app should fetch latest cache first, then optionally try live lookup when enabled.
Manual refresh must never overwrite a valid saved price with no result, unavailable, or error responses.
Future backend manual refresh may queue card-level priority refresh when backend support exists.
Currency is provided on each price record.
Tracked history means history since CardScanR started tracking the card.
Lifetime/all-time market history is not currently provided.
Images are referenced by URL and are not mirrored into this cache yet.
Japanese Pokemon catalogue files are built from official TCGdex REST endpoints using the ja API language path.
CardScanR cache language remains jp even when the upstream TCGdex API language path is ja.
Japanese current price files are optional and are only written when official/free source pricing is available.
Future authenticated app routes may be served by Cloudflare Workers or Supabase.
JP current prices may be partial and sourced from a controlled Pokewallet test builder.
Pokewallet JP coverage is set-detail-first and may fall back to set_id search only when set-detail cards are unavailable.
Pokewallet JP records may come from CardMarket or TCGPlayer depending on the record.
App should display JP price data only when a matching JP record exists.
If JP record is missing, show Japanese price not available yet.
Provider currency is not converted; app should display provider currency as-is.
EUR and USD must remain separate source currencies when both are present.
JP nextExpectedPriceUpdateAtUtc may be null until regular JP scheduling exists.
Pokewallet prices are overseas market guide prices.
TCGPlayer usually represents US market data and is commonly USD.
CardMarket usually represents European market data and is commonly EUR.
Pokewallet prices are not Australian sold prices and must not be labelled as AUD unless a provider explicitly returns AUD.
Apps should display the source and currency for Pokewallet prices.
Currency conversion is an app-layer feature for later and is not performed in the cache.
True Australian market pricing should come from eBay AU sold listings or local sales data later.
Pokewallet Pro trial discovery is diagnostics-only and must not write production price files.
Pokewallet image endpoints require an API key; discovery checks small image samples by response metadata only.
Pokewallet images are not stored in this repository by the Pro trial discovery probe.
Pokewallet production cache integration across languages comes later after diagnostics are reviewed.
Pokewallet provider-catalog files are foundation data for future CardScanR catalogue matching.
Provider-catalog card records store image endpoint references only, not image files.
CardScanR does not own Pokewallet image assets.
Provider images are not bulk-downloaded into this repository.
Apps should cache provider images locally only where allowed by provider terms and app policy.
Full Pokewallet provider-catalog per-set files use /provider-catalog/pokewallet/cards/{language}/{setId}.json.
Pokewallet provider metadata is not official CardScanR canonical catalogue data yet.
CardScanR may use provider metadata for scan and match assistance after review.
Pricing integration is separate from provider catalogue metadata.
Card images are mostly static reference assets and should be cached by exact card identity.
The recommended image cache key is {game}|{language}|{setId}|{collectorNumber}|{normalizedName}|{variant}.
Provider image IDs are references and are not the main CardScanR app identity.
Public image timestamps are UTC; Flutter should convert times locally where display is needed.
Binary image files are not included in this cache.
Image references may require provider access depending on source.
Future CardScanR CDN image URLs can be added later beside provider references.
Production catalogue integration comes later after provider metadata coverage is reviewed.
